sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39787" key="e)pikoili/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπικοιλ-ίς</orth>, <sense id="n39787.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπικυλίς</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:66" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.66</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
